description: A curated cyber-physical incident response case where a power-grid event is investigated alongside downstream water utility anomalies, network evidence, endpoint forensic evidence, dependency graph, and MITRE ATT&CK mapping.
case_goal: Determine whether the water anomaly is isolated, directly attacked, coordinated with power compromise, or plausibly cascading from upstream power disruption.
created_for: SANS Find Evil / Protocol SIFT autonomous incident response workflow

power_events.purpose: Normalized power-grid events from MSU/ORNL dataset

mitre_techniques.purpose: Normalized MITRE ATT&CK ICS and Enterprise techniques

dependency_graph.purpose: Infrastructure dependency graph for cascade reasoning

ground_truth.purpose: Expected case classification and expected claim statuses

expected_agent_behavior: Avoid claiming direct water attack unless network/water evidence supports it
Produce evidence references for every finding
